product_overview: QSM is a Quran school management platform for Arabic-first educational workflows, enabling authenticated users to view dashboards and manage student records. The app supports role-based access for school operations across admin and staff users.
core_goals: Sign in to access role-based school management features
Browse and manage the student roster
Access teacher management within the authenticated app

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Allows users to sign in and access protected areas of the system.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Fill in login details -> Submit the login form -> Enter the authenticated area
Navigate to /auth -> Leave required login information incomplete -> Submit the login form -> See validation feedback

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Shows authenticated users a summary of school statistics and key metrics.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View dashboard statistics and charts

features.name: Student Management
features.description: Lets authenticated users review the student list and work with student records.
user_flows: Navigate to /students -> View the list of students -> Create a new student record
Navigate to /students -> View the list of students -> Edit an existing student record

features.name: Teacher Management
features.description: Lets authenticated users access the teachers management area and review teacher records.
user_flows: Navigate to /teachers -> View the list of teachers
